textPlain: RAD disks surviving warm boots were so mind-bending to me, coming from the MS-DOS RAMDRIVE.SYS world before ever seeing an Amiga. The dynamic size on RAM disks was also pretty cool but wrapping my mind around that was much easier.AmigaDOS was really cool. I still miss ARexx ports (an IPC mechanism used for application automation) pretty regularly (though COM on Windows isn't a bad substitute).
